employment.note: The employment section has a handwritten 'UNKNOWN' annotation, while the visible table records 0 for existing and proposed employees.

existing-use-details.use-details: Local Authority housing estate with council and leasehold properties, including a community hall and 9 retail units (5 currently in use).

hours-of-operation.use-other: Non-residential uses listed on the form

materials.note: The form repeatedly states that final materials will be subject to detailed or reserved matters applications.

non-res-floorspace.note: The form uses legacy use classes and includes handwritten totals. Row values have been mapped into the current structure where possible, with legacy labels retained in specified-use.

ownership-certs.note: Certificate B says 'Please see the attached list' for notice recipients. The owners-and-tenants list has been transcribed from rotated OCR and visual inspection of attachment pages 9-20. Some OCR-assisted names, dates and postcodes need human review against the source PDF before this is treated as final.

pre-app-advice.reference: Minutes of Design Team meetings [example given for meeting held on 10th September 2010 and attended by IB]
pre-app-advice.advice-summary: Local Planning and Urban Design Officers have been consulted on a regular basis and at all strategic points in the development of the masterplan and Outline Planning Application.

proposal-details.description: Demolition of existing building that contain 418 existing properties and replacement with a high quality regeneration scheme that will contain up to 884 new mixed tenure homes, with community space (D1), retail space (A1, A2, A3, A4, A5), live/work space (Sui Generis) and B1/D1 space.

res-units.note: The form has a 4+ bedrooms column. Those values have been represented with no-of-bedrooms set to 4 because the current field is numeric.

site-locations.description: The Colville Estate, Hackney, is bounded by Penn Street, Hyde Road and Poole Street to the South, Branch Place to the North, Whitmore Road to the East and Imber Street to the West.

vehicle-parking.note: The form annotates some proposed parking values as minimums, for example disability spaces. The module captures the numeric values but not the minimum qualifier.

waste-storage-collection.waste-storage-area-details: The illustrative masterplan proposes internal bin stores and recycling areas close to each residential entrance in line with LBH policy.
waste-storage-collection.separate-recycling-arrangements-details: Separate EuroBin Waste storage has been built into the illustrative masterplan scheme.

additional-properties.notes: Draft submission data extracted from the completed 2011/0734 application form for Outline Planning Permission with Some Matters Reserved and visible information from the London Borough of Hackney form. The data has been mapped as far as possible to the 2026 submission data standard. Some legacy-form content does not fit the current module structure exactly, so selected module JSON files include a `note` field to preserve important annotations and extraction caveats. Where the current specification warrants a reference but the completed form does not provide one, the extraction may generate a stable reference so links between sections can work; generated or unresolved references are flagged in extraction-report.md for human review. Open human checks remain in extraction-report.md and should be reviewed before treating this as final submission data.
